parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.prompt }], temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 1024 } }}

={{ { title: '[WAZUH] [' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.hostname + '] ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.rule_description, group_id: 1, customer_id: 2, priority_id: $('Parse Alert').item.json.priority, state: 'new', soc_cve_list: ($('Parse Response').item.json.cve_list || []).join(', '), article: { body: '

SOC Alert Briefing

' + $('Parse Response').item.json.summary + '

Vulnerability Analysis

CVEs: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.cve_list || []).join(', ') + '

' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.cve_details || 'N/A') + '

Severity: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.severity + '/15

Host: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.hostname + ' (ID: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.agent_id + ')

Source IP: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.source_ip + '

Rule ID: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.rule_id + '

IOCs: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.iocs || []).join(', ') + '

Immediate Actions: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.immediate_actions || []).join(', ') + '

Assessment: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.severity_assessment || 'N/A') + '

', content_type: 'text/html' } } }}
